2606.10684.title: Divide and Cooperate: Role-Decomposed Multi-Agent LLM Training with Cross-Agent Learning Signals
2606.10684.paper_summary: Modern language agents which perform multi-step reasoning have shown strong performance in knowledge-intensive question answering. However, existing approaches typically couple evidence acquisition and answer generation within a single policy. This forces a single model to play multiple potentially conflicting roles, inducing a combinatorial explosion in the policy space and hindering efficient exploration. It also introduces a credit assignment problem during training: a search action that retrieves sufficient evidence may still be penalized when generation fails, and vice versa. We propose DAC (Divide and Cooperate), a role-decomposed multi-agent training framework that divides agentic search into two cooperative subtasks, each handled by a dedicated agent trained with role-specific learning signals. The generator serves a dual role as both an answer producer and an evidence sufficiency verifier, abstaining when retrieved evidence is insufficient. This abstention signal is incorporated into the search agent's reward, providing structured cross-agent learning signals that improve credit assignment. Conversely, the searcher exposes the generator to diverse and challenging evidence environments by hard-positive evidence augmentation, improving its robustness. Experiments on general and multi-hop QA benchmarks show that DAC, implemented via parameter-efficient LoRA modules over a shared backbone, achieves strong performance against prior baselines that rely on full fine-tuning of monolithic models.
2606.10684.paper_summary_zh: 現代語言代理人進行多步推理在知識密集型問題回答中表現出色。<lb/>然而，現有的方法通常將證據獲取和答案生成結合在單一策略中。<lb/>這迫使單一模型扮演多個可能衝突的角色，導致策略空間的組合爆炸，並妨礙有效的探索。<lb/>它還在訓練過程中引入了信用分配問題：檢索足夠證據的搜索行動在生成失敗時可能仍會受到懲罰，反之亦然。<lb/>我們提出DAC（Divide and Cooperate），一個角色分解的多代理訓練框架，將代理搜索分為兩個合作的子任務，每個子任務由專門的代理處理，並使用角色特定的學習信號進行訓練。<lb/>生成器同時擔任答案生成者和證據充分性驗證者的雙重角色，當檢索的證據不足時會選擇不生成。<lb/>這一選擇不生成的信號被納入搜索代理的獎勵中，提供結構化的跨代理學習信號，改善信用分配。<lb/>相對地，搜索者通過強正證據增強將生成器暴露於多樣且具有挑戰性的證據環境中，提高其穩健性。<lb/>在一般和多跳QA基準上的實驗顯示，通過參數高效的LoRA模塊在共享骨幹上實現的DAC，對比依賴於對單體模型進行全面微調的先前基準，取得了強勁的表現。
2606.10684.author: Jaewan Park et.al.
2606.10684.authors: Jaewan Park, Solbee Cho, Jay-Yoon Lee
